mapper.select: SELECT EMP_ID AS empId, EMP_NM AS empName, DEPT_CD AS deptCode, POSITION AS position, USE_YN AS useYn, REG_DT AS hireDate FROM tb_emp WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY EMP_ID
SELECT EMP_ID AS empId, EMP_NM AS empName, DEPT_CD AS deptCode, POSITION AS position, USE_YN AS useYn, REG_DT AS hireDate FROM tb_emp WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_emp ( EMP_ID, EMP_PW, EMP_NM, DEPT_CD, POSITION, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{empId}, #{empPw}, #{empName}, #{deptCode}, #{position}, #{useYn} )
